inSignalEnable.description: SlateRef<string> signal name or $varName that enables scheduled incidents.

inSignalDisable.description: SlateRef<string> signal name or $varName that disables scheduled incidents.

intervalTicks.description: SlateRef<int?> interval in ticks between repeated incidents, or $varName.

randomIncidents.description: SlateRef<int?> count of randomly timed incidents, or $varName.

startOffsetTicks.description: SlateRef<int> initial delay in ticks, expression, or $varName.

duration.description: SlateRef<int> scheduling duration in ticks, expression, or $varName.

points.description: SlateRef<float> incident points override, expression, or $varName.

faction.description: SlateRef<Faction> faction variable or def-like literal.
